allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json; f=open\('/d/src/projects/Internal/epl_match_simulator/assets/pl_2025_26_teams.json'\); data=json.load\(f\); print\('Teams count:', len\(data['teams']\)\); print\('First team:', data['teams'][0]['name'], '- Formation:', data['teams'][0].get\('formation', 'N/A'\)\)")
